description:
Professional Text Editor + World's Best Hex Editor


- Fixed after a Replace all operation, sometimes bytes at the end of the file were not drawn properly until another edit was made.
- Fixed opening a file from Windows Explorer when 010 Editor was minimized did not properly restore the application.
- Fixed in the Run on File drop-down, a template can now be run on a duplicate view of a file.
- Fixed on Linux, the Shift_JIS character set could crash on some files (switched from icu to iconv).
- Fixed Goto Address now works with numbers in the Template Results in Decimal/Hex notation.
